nodes.label: AI as collaborative brainstorming partner
nodes.grounding_span: The AI is tool that helps me brainstorm and develop ideas that I can modify based on the needs of my students

nodes.label: AI accuracy and reliability in content and grading
nodes.grounding_span: I always have to fact check that the information presented is accurate

nodes.label: Teacher professional judgment over AI output
nodes.grounding_span: I rarely take them as it because I know what my students can and cannot do

nodes.label: Human emotional connection in teaching
nodes.grounding_span: An AI cannot connect with a child emotionally after losing a loved one

nodes.label: AI for lesson planning and engagement
nodes.label_negative: AI for grading and data analysis
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to help me brainstorm lessons and lessons plans

nodes.label: Student data privacy and ethical use
nodes.label_negative: Unrestricted AI access to student data
nodes.grounding_span: My district is trying to restrict AI use for students to increase privacy and safety

nodes.label: Student-centered personalized education
nodes.grounding_span: I know what my students can and cannot do

nodes.label: Critical thinking and ethical AI use in students
nodes.grounding_span: I am trying to teach my kids to think critically, to analyze information, and to learn to efficiently and ethically use tools like AI

nodes.label: Human relational connection and emotional support
nodes.grounding_span: An AI cannot connect with a child emotionally after losing a loved one

nodes.label: Teacher autonomy and professional judgment
nodes.grounding_span: I know what my students can and cannot do

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as brainstorming tool
nodes.grounding_span: I will go back and forth with it

nodes.label: Frustration with AI grading inaccuracies
nodes.grounding_span: The AI scored students with perfect scores occasionally, but I would give it a much lower grade

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in data analysis and grading
nodes.grounding_span: I handle data analysis on my own, and I don't have AI grade writing

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI use for engagement
nodes.grounding_span: I will continue to use AI and try to find new ways to engage students

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through back-and-forth dialogue
nodes.grounding_span: I will go back and forth with it, making minor adjustments, adding clarification, or adding new ideas

nodes.label: Domain-specific boundary setting for AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I handle data analysis on my own, and I don't have AI grade writing
